title: beadlea subalpestris
intro: Beadlea subalpestris, also known as the beadlea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of beadlea subalpestris include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Beadlea subalpestris is often prepared in herbal teas or tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
